pi_items.source: Verified by reading export_result.sh which analyzes this specific output path
Verified via download script (install_astroimagej.sh) which retrieves from esahubble.org
Verified by downloading FITS files and inspecting header TARGET keyword (M16-A)
Verified by extracting FITS headers, matching filter mappings (F673N = SII, F656N = H-alpha, F502N = OIII), and confirming standard Hubble Palette mappings

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on actual FITS data of the Eagle Nebula (M16) downloaded from the ESA Hubble FITS Liberator Datasets. The expected output file path is '/home/ga/AstroImages/processed/eagle_nebula_hubble_palette.png'. The standard Hubble Palette accurately assigns the narrow-band filters: F673N (673nmos.fits, representing [SII]) mapped to Red, F656N (656nmos.fits, representing H-alpha) mapped to Green, and F502N (502nmos.fits, representing [OIII]) mapped to Blue.
